summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Auralis token presale website. All backend APIs working perfectly (8/8 tests passed). Frontend UI and integration testing successful with wallet connection and order creation flow working correctly. Design follows cartoonish/playful theme with Russian text throughout.
passed_tests: API root endpoint returns correct token info (ARA, $0.01)
Order creation API with proper validation
Error handling for orders without connected wallet
Hero section displays with gradient background and 3D avatar
Token sale section with wallet selection (MetaMask/Petra)
Token quantity input and total cost calculation ($0.01 per token)
Wallet connection simulation and UI updates
Order creation integration with success notifications
Features section with 4 feature cards in Russian
Tokenomics section with pie chart and correct distribution
Roadmap section with Q1-Q4 2026 and 2027+ timeline
Footer with social links and copyright (© 2026 Auralis)
Glassmorphism effects and modern UI design
